parameters.query:
SELECT
    p.name AS referencia,
    p.title AS titulo,
    p.description AS descripcion_detallada,
    p.price AS precio,
    p.area AS metros_cuadrados,
    p.bedrooms AS habitaciones,
    p.bathrooms AS banos,
    p.parking_spaces AS parqueaderos,
    p.year_built AS anio_construccion,
    p.floor AS piso_planta,
    t.name AS tipo_propiedad,
    p.street AS direccion,
    p.city AS ciudad,
    p.tour_360_url AS link_tour_virtual,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.wp_post_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'https://inmobi.com.ec/?p=' || p.wp_post_id 
        ELSE 'https://inmobi.com.ec/catalogo/' 
    END AS link_web
FROM estate_property p
LEFT JOIN estate_property_type t ON p.property_type_id = t.id
WHERE (p.id::text = '{{ $json.id_propiedad }}' OR p.name ILIKE '{{ $json.id_propiedad }}')
LIMIT 1;

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json)[0] || { error: 'Propiedad no encontrada' }, null, 2) }}
